Environmental Protection.summary: Strong advocate for climate action and environmental protection legislation.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate, 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with clean energy provisions (Senate, 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Supports sentencing reform and criminal justice system improvements.

Progressive Taxation.summary: Advocates for higher taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with corporate minimum tax (Senate, 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Supports LGBTQ+ equality and anti-discrimination protections.
